$comment: Project-specific Bash redirects consumed by the global hook at ~/.claude/hooks/redirect-bash-commands.py. Each entry tests every `commands` pattern (`Bash(...)`-style glob, mirrors permissions.deny syntax) against the proposed Bash command; the first match denies the tool call and surfaces `reason` back to the agent. See AGENTS.md §3 for why these scripts exist.

redirects.reason: Use `scripts/check-ts` instead of invoking tsc / bun test / stylelint directly. It chains stylelint --fix + tsc --noEmit + bun test in the right cwd; trailing args pass through to `bun test` so single-file iteration still works (`scripts/check-ts src/jot_view/store.test.ts`). See AGENTS.md §3.
